grant.summary: The Foundation for Anesthesia Education and Research (FAER) announced the Medical Student Anesthesia Research Fellowships (MSARF) Summer Program for 2026, with Hospital for Special Surgery serving as a host site for a participating medical student.
grant.recipient: Matthew Ruppert (Medical Student from Wake Forest University School of Medicine), hosted at Hospital for Special Surgery.
grant.agency: Foundation for Anesthesia Education and Research (FAER).
grant.why_it_matters: A lab supply sales representative should contact the Anesthesiology Department at Hospital for Special Surgery to offer support for the research activities of the incoming medical student fellow.

ai_summary: Hospital for Special Surgery will host a medical student for an anesthesia research fellowship in summer 2026. This signifies ongoing research activity and a commitment to academic programs within their anesthesia department. For a lab supply sales team, this presents an opportunity to engage with researchers and potentially supply new projects or expanding research needs related to anesthesia, requiring various lab consumables and equipment.
